zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun於1180年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀吉爾卡包格時，她的父親Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG36歲，母親Beatrix von Saarbrücken20歲。她於1200年與Philipp III von Bolanden在海因里希_海普洛文次結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1236年在德國享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun于1180年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀吉爾卡包格时，她的父亲Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG36岁，母亲Beatrix von Saarbrücken20岁。她于1200年与Philipp III von Bolanden在海因里希_海普洛文次结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1236年在德国享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Daun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Daun, a place in the Eifel region. Compare   Dawn  .

Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Kincardineshire): possibly a nickname from Scottish Gaelic dàn ‘intrepid’. The Aberdeenshire name is said by Black to be a variant of Don , itself a variant of Dun and Dunn , but the phonological development seems unlikely.

variants.name: Dawn
meanings: English (Derbyshire and Nottinghamshire): of Norman origin, probably a clipped form of Dawnay or Dawney (compare Dana ), habitational names from one of the many places in northern France named for an alder grove (Old French aulnai, aulnoi, Latinized as alnetum). With fused preposition d(e), Anglo-Norman d'Aunai became Dawnay, Dawney and (with loss of the final syllable) Dawn. Laney is another form of this surname with fused definite article. See also Dando , from Anglo-Norman d'Aunou, with which d'Aunai may sometimes have been confused.

English: from Middle English Dawen, a variant of Dawes with the weak declension genitival suffix -(e)n (Old English -an) instead of the standard Middle English -es. The usage is mainly restricted to West Midlands dialects of Middle English.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun was born in 1180, in Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG, was 36 and her mother, Beatrix von Saarbrücken, was 20. She married Philipp III von Bolanden in 1200, in Rhineland, Prussia. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1236, in Germany, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun est née en 1180, à Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Saarbrücken, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Philipp III von Bolanden en 1200, à Rhénanie, Prusse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1236, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun 1180 in Kyrburg, Kirn, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG 36 und ihre Mutter Beatrix von Saarbrücken 20. Sie hat 1200 in Rheinprovinz, Preußen Philipp III von Bolanden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1236 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun(이)가 1180년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 커 키르버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix von Saarbrücken(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1200년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠에서 Philipp III von Bolanden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1236년 독일에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix von Kyrburg Daun родилась в 1180 г. в местности кирбург, кирн, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard I. VON KYRBURG было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Saarbrücken, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philipp III von Bolanden в 1200 г. в местности раинпровинз, Пруссия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1236 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 56 лет.
